title: Buck Privates
writer: Melville W. Brown, John B. Clymer, Albert DeMond
actors: Lya De Putti, Malcolm McGregor, Zasu Pitts
plot: Pvt. Smith, an American soldier stationed in a German town during the occupation of Germany after World War I, falls in love with the daughter of the town's leading citizen. The problem is that his sworn enemy, Sgt. Butts, also ha...
